title: Weather Outfit
description: Skip the forecast dependency and build an outfit suggestion from felt temperature, weather, and travel context.

comfort.hot: It will feel warm, so keep fabrics light and breathable.
comfort.pleasant: Comfortable conditions. Light layering should be enough.
comfort.cool: There is a cool edge in the air, so choose easy on-off layers.
comfort.cold: It is cold enough that warmth should win over style-first choices.

packingTips: When indoor and outdoor temperatures differ a lot, removable middle layers matter most.
Rain and wind often change comfort more than the headline temperature.
If you will walk for hours, shoe comfort usually matters more than outerwear styling.
